name: ClarionAssistant
description: AI-powered Clarion IDE assistant with embedded Claude Code terminal, MCP tools, LSP integration, and IDE automation
changeLog:
## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-11
- Add Codex backend to ClarionAssistant [Task #a32d69dc]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-11
- mcp-extra.json sidecar for IDE-pane custom MCP servers (issue #26) [Task #be37229f]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-05-07
- External MCP client access (issue #24) [Task #678f6c38]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-26
- Plan-aware backend model selection (Claude / Copilot / Codex) [Task #bc3d6aab]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-24
- Rename ClaudeChatControl → AssistantChatControl (and related class/file names) [Task #d08f6ac5]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-24
- Extract shared launch scaffolding between LaunchClaudeForTab / LaunchCopilotForTab (block 3rd-backend copy-paste) [Task #a77ec370]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-24
- Secure MCP HTTP server: add per-session auth token, tighten CORS, validate Origin/Host [Task #84dbd237]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-24
- Fix DocGraph FTS5 extension load failure surfacing as "database disk image is malformed" [Task #bb2ca7ca]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-23
- Unify or cross-reference Terminal/AGENTS.md and Terminal/clarion-assistant-prompt.md [Task #13d2dd2c]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-23
- Dashboard backend-override dropdown: session-scoped selection applied to all launch buttons [Task #f3e8d1de]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-23
- Settings dialog redesign: per-backend tabs + "Set as Default" button + drop General page [Task #436708b6]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-12
- Add textDocument/rename to Clarion LSP server (PR to msarson) [Task #b8573967]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-12
- Two-way messaging: ClarionAssistant addin channel listener [Task #e3bfcb5b]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-06
- Add Home Tab + Multi-Terminal Tab System [Task #ed963e77]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-04-06
- Add Projects Tab to Home Page [Task #b4212386]

## v0.1.1 - 2026-03-30
